Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tina Shih, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Ms. Shih discuss and confirm what her duties and responsibilities will be if the court grants her petition, especially those requiring a prior court order.

After additional discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. Tina Shih is appointed Administrator of the estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of Inventory and Appraisal is set for May-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If an Inventory and Appraisal is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-24-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.
